kind: radix pass-count specialization for fixed-width U32 sort keys
profile_source: full fj-lax Criterion profile after FFT/RFFT work showed sort_64k_u32 among the remaining fj-lax hotspots; focused ts2 baseline confirmed sort_64k_u32 median 5.2727 ms.
lever_summary: Use four stable LSD radix byte passes for DType::U32 in sort_along_axis_literal_radix. U32 keys have only four significant low bytes; high bytes are constant for both ascending and descending-complement keys. All other dtype-family radix paths continue through the eight-pass helper.
method: RCH Criterion A/B on worker ts2; same command before and after: cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'eval/(sort_64k_u32|sort_64k_f32|sort_64k_f64|sort_calib_reduce_64k_i64)' --sample-size 12 --measurement-time 1 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot.

calibration_reduce_64k_i64_us.note: later candidate run was about 5.1% slower on the unrelated calibration; U32 still improves 1.28x raw

change.lever: DType::U32 selects radix_pairs_ascending_u32 (4 byte passes); radix_pairs_ascending remains the generic 8 byte path.

isomorphism.ordering_preserved: yes; U32 unsigned order is fully determined by the low 32 key bits, and descending complement has constant high bytes for all U32 keys
isomorphism.tie_breaking_unchanged: yes; the same input-order index is carried in each pair and stable LSD radix preserves equal-key order
isomorphism.floating_point: N/A; U32 branch only, existing float radix path remains eight-pass
isomorphism.golden_outputs: fj_lax_sort_u32_four_pass_2026-06-05.golden sha256 verified; combined output blob sha256 3b64f6423070fb99c0824260f664bdc30815e851b5cf9a46a94ed65027c39f10

validation.name: focused_u32_parity
validation.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax radix_sort_u32_ascending_matches_unsigned_reference --lib -- --nocapture

validation.name: sort_filter
validation.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax sort --lib -- --nocapture

validation.name: check
validation.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo check -p fj-lax --all-targets

validation.name: clippy
validation.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-lax --all-targets -- -D warnings

validation.name: ubs
validation.command: ubs crates/fj-lax/src/tensor_ops.rs | rg 'CRITICAL|panic!|expected U32|Critical issues|Summary Statistics'
validation.result: file-wide UBS still reports 5 pre-existing non-U32 test panic findings; the two new expected-U32 panic findings from the first draft were removed

alien_primitive: fixed-width LSD radix specialization; safe Rust; no C BLAS/MKL/XLA or unsafe code
